title: Karl's Gun Mod
description: This incorporates [TaCz] Timeless and Classics zero gun mod and many others. This mod's purpose is to inprove survival and the vanilla+ experience
body: Do you want to make minecraft look better, wield cool firearms or make minecraft better with QoL? This mod is this place! This mod uses the [TaCz} Timeless and Classics zero mod to incorporate your favourite firearms into minecraft! Give the blocky world a realistic look with BSL Shaders and Default HD 128x to take the graphics to the next level! Improve the Minecraft experience with Appleskin, Just Enough items, Embeddium and Jade to make sure that Minecraft couldn't be easier!
